action: Retrieve avatar IDs using the API and associate each character with a unique avatar ID.

recipe.steps: Retrieve the user ID using the get_user_id tool.
Retrieve avatar IDs from the API using the obtained user ID.
Associate each character from the story with a unique avatar ID from the retrieved avatar IDs.
Save the avatar associations in memory using the save_data_in_memory tool.
Confirm the completion of the task with the StatusVerifier agent.
